name: Chocolate Walnut Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate and butter together, stirring constantly until smooth. Set aside to cool slightly.
2. Beat the egg yolks for 1-2 minutes, then gradually add half of the sugar and vanilla. Mix in the cooled chocolate mixture. Fold in the flour and ground walnuts.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites with cream of tartar until foamy. Gradually add the remaining sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
4. Stir one-fourth of the egg whites into the chocolate mixture, then gently fold in the remaining egg whites to combine.
5. Pour the batter into a 9-inch springform pan lined with parchment paper. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-35 minutes or until the sides start to separate from the pan but the center is still moist. Cool on a rack.
6. Remove the torte from the pan and prepare the Chocolate Rum Glaze:
a. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate and butter together, stirring constantly until smooth.
b. Remove from heat and stir in corn syrup and rum (optional).
c. Place the torte upside-down on a rack over a tray to catch excess glaze. Spread a very thin layer of glaze over the top and sides of the torte to set the surface. Chill for 15 minutes to firm the glaze.
d. Reheat the remaining glaze to thin it, then pour over the top and sides of the torte. When the glaze is firm, remove the cake from the rack and place it on a large plate. Decorate the top and sides with shaved chocolate, if desired.
6. Serve and enjoy your Chocolate Walnut Torte!
